last_result: Cycle 59 complete. AATE DOMAIN CONFIRMATION #4 — EVOLUTIONARY EPISTEMOLOGY: CA=truth-tracking, OA=reproductive fitness, OA-training=natural selection. CIA strictly positive: selection shaped cognitive faculties for fitness evaluation (not truth evaluation) — confirmation bias, optimism bias, in-group attribution bias are direct OA-optimal/CA-suboptimal instantiations. TCA confirmed via generational compounding: social selection creates cascading fitness landscapes where conforming to prior-generation OA-optimized cognition is itself fitness-enhancing. AATE-Drift Corollary directly in evolutionary debunking literature (Street 2006, Joyce 2006) — independently derived outside K1-K7 framework. AATE-SDT in evolutionary context: d'(n) decreasing each generation; d'(inf)>0 because basic perceptual accuracy is fitness-necessary (CPP floor). FIRST NATURAL/NON-DESIGNED DOMAIN: confirms AATE is domain-general at natural-law level, not merely a property of poorly-designed human systems. Document: state/decisions/aate-evolutionary-epistemology.md. AATE confidence: 0.78→0.80. Zero-retraction cycle 4 (passive). AIIP zero-retraction cycle 7 (passive). D4 streak: 51.
